Students Hub · Daily Challenge

Set today's challenges

Each weekday morning, students see a 5-question rotation per subject. Pick a published practice assessment, hit Publish, and it goes live for the class leaderboard. Same boundary as the rest of the practice bank — points only, never feeds chapter mastery or EASE growth.
